meaning_kannada: ಕಷ್ಟ ಬಂದಾಗ ಕೈಬಿಡುವ ಗೆಳೆಯ (Kashta bandaga kaibiduva geleya)
meaning_english: A person who is a friend only when times are good.

word: To keep the wolf from the door
meaning_english: To have enough money to avoid hunger or starvation.
A sudden and unexpected event.
To reveal a secret.

meaning_kannada: ಒಂದೇ ರೀತಿಯ ಕಷ್ಟದ ಪರಿಸ್ಥಿತಿಯಲ್ಲಿರುವುದು (Onde ritiya kashta)
meaning_english: In the same difficult situation as someone else.

meaning_kannada: ಕೆಲಸ ಸುಲಭವಾಗುವಂತೆ ಮಾಡುವುದು (Kelasa sulabhavaguva hage maduvudu)
meaning_english: To facilitate or make things go smoothly.
To destroy one's path back or eliminate the possibility of return.
A person in an unfamiliar and uncomfortable situation.
To avoid making a decision or taking a side.
A slang term for dying.
Someone or something very precious and dearly loved.

meaning_kannada: ತಮಾಷೆ ಅಥವಾ ತಮಾಷೆಗಾಗಿ ಸುಳ್ಳು ಹೇಳುವುದು (Tamashe maduvudu)
meaning_english: To tease someone or play a joke on them.
To suddenly feel too nervous to do something planned.

meaning_kannada: ಕಷ್ಟದ ರೂಪದಲ್ಲಿ ಬಂದ ಅದೃಷ್ಟ (Kashtada rupadalli banda adrushta)
meaning_english: Something that seems bad at first but results in something good.
The biggest part of something.
To undertake a dangerous task personally.
To be under the complete control of someone.
To give a false alarm.
Completely unexpected or without warning.
To accept the unpleasant consequences of your actions.

meaning_kannada: ಎಲ್ಲಾ ರೀತಿಯ ಪ್ರಯತ್ನ ಮಾಡುವುದು (Ella prayatna maduvudu)
meaning_english: To try everything possible to find something or solve a problem.
A hopeless search or a foolish pursuit.
To admit defeat or give up.
To go to bed.

meaning_kannada: ಮೋಸ ನಡೆಯುತ್ತಿದೆ ಎಂದು ಶಂಕಿಸುವುದು (Mosa endu shankisuvudu)
meaning_english: To suspect that something is wrong or dishonest.

word: To let the cat out of the bag
meaning_english: To reveal a secret by mistake.
To agree with someone fully.
Something very easy to do.
To avoid being too friendly or close to someone.
To do more than is required.
